description: Style Note Elegant and bright casual wear with a flattering Fit and impressive styling is definitely Tonga's forte. This top from Tonga is a definite must for the update of your summer monsoon wardrobe. Keep it stylish and simple by pairing up this trendy top with flats and jeggings or dark coloured cotton capris. We like to describe this look as charmingly casual! Product DetailsBeige top with dark brown and black geometric patterns on the body and faded prints on the sleeves, has a boat neck, broad ribbed cuffs and hemline, batwing sleeves Material and Care 95% rayon and 5% spandex Hand wash cold Do not bleach Hang dry Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
